languages.text: {n}Ведка кивает своим мыслям, а затем оборачивается на вас.{/n} "Хорошо, что вы отослали его. Янур — хороший солдат, но иногда слишком упрям. Я верю, что победа предрешена, но Зарков учит всегда иметь запасной план".

{n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns to you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."
languages.original_text: {n}Ведка кивает своим мыслям, а затем оборачивается на вас.{/n} "Хорошо, что вы отослали его. Янур — хороший солдат, но иногда слишком упрям. Я верю, что победа предрешена, но Зарков учит всегда иметь запасной план".

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns back at you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."

{n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns to you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."
"Janur is a good soldier, but sometimes he's too stubborn and too used to following orders."

{n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns back at you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."

{n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns to you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."

languages.text: 「ジャンは良い兵士だが、時には頑固すぎるし、命令に従うことに慣れすぎている」
languages.original_text: "Janur is a good soldier, but sometimes he's too stubborn and too used to following orders."

traits.locale_text: 「ジャンは良い兵士だが、時には頑固すぎるし、命令に従うことに慣れすぎている」

languages.text: {n}Dunawski, kendi kendine baş sallayıp sana dönüyor.{/n} "Onu göndermeniz iyi oldu. Janur iyi bir askerdir ama bazen çok dik kafalı olabiliyor. Zaferimizin kesin olduğuna inancım tam ama Zarkov size daima bir yedek planınızın olması gerektiğini öğretir."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns to you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski, kendi kendine baş sallayıp sana dönüyor.{/n} "Onu göndermeniz iyi oldu. Janur iyi bir askerdir ama bazen çok dik kafalı olabiliyor. Zaferimizin kesin olduğuna inancım tam ama Zarkov size daima bir yedek planınızın olması gerektiğini öğretir."

languages.text: {n}Dunawski asiente para sí y se gira hacia ti.{/n} «Ha hecho bien en enviarlo de vuelta. Janur es un buen soldado, pero a veces es demasiado tozudo. Confío plenamente en nuestra victoria, pero en Zarkov una aprende a tener siempre un plan B».
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns to you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski asiente para sí y se gira hacia ti.{/n} «Ha hecho bien en enviarlo de vuelta. Janur es un buen soldado, pero a veces es demasiado tozudo. Confío plenamente en nuestra victoria, pero en Zarkov una aprende a tener siempre un plan B».

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡自顾自地点了点头，随后转向你。{/n}“您把他派回去是对的。雅努尔是个优秀的士兵，就是有时太一根筋了。我相信我们必胜无疑，可扎尔科夫让人明白，凡事都得留个后手。”
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns to you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡自顾自地点了点头，随后转向你。{/n}“您把他派回去是对的。雅努尔是个优秀的士兵，就是有时太一根筋了。我相信我们必胜无疑，可扎尔科夫让人明白，凡事都得留个后手。”

languages.text: {n}Dunawski acquiesce pour elle-même et se tourne vers vous.{/n} « Vous avez bien fait de le renvoyer. Janur est un bon soldat, mais il est bien trop têtu. Je ne doute pas un instant de notre victoire, mais Zarkov nous enseigne de toujours avoir un plan de secours. »
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns to you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski acquiesce pour elle-même et se tourne vers vous.{/n} « Vous avez bien fait de le renvoyer. Janur est un bon soldat, mais il est bien trop têtu. Je ne doute pas un instant de notre victoire, mais Zarkov nous enseigne de toujours avoir un plan de secours. »

languages.text: {n}Dunawski nickt und wendet sich dir zu.{/n} "Es ist gut, dass Ihr ihn zurückgeschickt habt. Janur ist ein guter Soldat, aber mitunter etwas zu nüchtern. Ich glaube fest an unseren Sieg, aber Zarkov lehrt uns, immer einen Plan B zu haben."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski nods to herself and turns to you.{/n} "It's a good thing you sent him back. Janur is a good soldier, but he can be too hard-headed. I have faith that our victory is certain, but Zarkov teaches you to always have a backup plan."
